objects.name: Analytic 1852
objects.description: Defender correlates a sandboxed app downloading or receiving opaque/encoded blobs, writing high-entropy content into container/tmp, performing decode/decompress/reassembly, and then executing/loaded as Mach-O or bundle (dlopen) or leveraging JIT/RWX pages to run the decoded payload. Sequence: opaque download or IPC → high-entropy writes/split-file bursts → decode/unarchive → new Mach-O/bundle in tmp → dlopen/posix_spawn or RWX region activity.

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: iOS:unifiedlog
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: NSFileHandle/NSFileManager writes creating high-entropy files within app container (/var/mobile/Containers/Data/Application/<GUID>/tmp|Library/Caches)

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: iOS:unifiedlog
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: Code signing validation events referencing newly written local Mach-O/bundle prior to exec or dlopen

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: iOS:unifiedlog
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: dyld: dlopen/dyld_cache load from non-standard app-writable path

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: iOS:unifiedlog
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: Per-app VPN flow logging indicating opaque/archived payload transfer preceding local decode

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: iOS:unifiedlog
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: mmap/mprotect transitions to PROT_EXEC for pages associated with recently written files

x_mitre_mutable_elements.description: Max interval to link write→decode→load/exec (e.g., 5–45s depending on device and iOS version).
Entropy threshold to consider a file obfuscated/packed (e.g., ≥ 7.3).
Minimum count of small sequential writes to flag reassembly behaviors.
Container subpaths to monitor (tmp, Library/Caches, Documents) vary by policy.
Allowlist of legitimate dynamically loaded bundles/plugins to reduce FPs.
Known enterprise services carrying opaque archives to avoid false alerts.
